help.title: Help & FAQ
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know about YancoCup.
help.stillNeedHelpDesc: Open an issue on GitHub and we'll get back to you.
help.whatIsA: YancoCup is a free soccer prediction platform where you predict match scores and compete with friends on leaderboards. It covers the FIFA World Cup 2026, UEFA Champions League, and top European leagues. No real money is involved — it's pure bragging rights.
help.freeA: Yes, completely free. No subscriptions, no in-app purchases, no ads. YancoCup is a passion project built for soccer fans.
help.accountQ: How do I create an account?
help.accountA: Tap 'Sign In' and choose 'Create Account'. You'll need an email, password, and a unique handle. Your YancoVerse account works across all YancoVerse products.
help.competitionsA: FIFA World Cup 2026 (primary), UEFA Champions League, Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1, and European Championship.
help.howPredictQ: How do I make a prediction?
help.howPredictA: Navigate to a competition, go to Predictions, and enter the score you think each match will end with. You can predict individual matches or use batch mode to predict all at once.
help.deadlineA: Predictions lock at kickoff time. You can submit or change your prediction any time before the match starts.
help.changeA: Yes, you can update your prediction as many times as you want before kickoff. Once the match starts, it's locked in.
help.jokerA: The Joker doubles your points for one match per matchday. Choose wisely — pick the match you're most confident about.
help.scoringA: Exact score = 3 points. Correct goal difference = 2 points. Correct result (win/draw/loss) = 1 point. Wrong prediction = 0 points. Bonuses apply for upsets and perfect group stages.
help.knockoutA: Yes! Points are multiplied in knockout rounds: 1.5x in Round of 32, 2x in Round of 16, 2.5x in Quarterfinals, and 3x in Semifinals and Final.
help.streakA: Consecutive correct predictions (any points earned) build your streak counter. Longer streaks earn badges. You can use a streak freeze once per competition to protect your streak.
help.poolA: A pool is a private group where you and your friends predict match scores and compete on a shared leaderboard. Each pool has its own chat and matchday recaps.
help.joinPoolQ: How do I join a pool?
help.joinPoolA: Get a 6-character join code from the pool creator, go to Pools, and enter it. You can also join via a share link.
help.poolLimitQ: How many pools can I join?
help.poolLimitA: You can join multiple pools and compete in all of them simultaneously. There's no limit.
help.deleteAccountA: Yes. Contact us via GitHub to request account deletion. All your predictions, pool memberships, and personal data will be permanently removed.
help.languageQ: How do I change the language?
help.languageA: Tap the language switcher in the navigation bar. YancoCup supports English, Arabic, Spanish, French, German, and Portuguese.
help.dataA: Only what's needed to run the platform: your email, handle, predictions, and basic analytics. We don't sell data or use tracking cookies. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
help.scoresDelayA: Live scores come from third-party APIs and may have a 1-2 minute delay. This is normal and doesn't affect your prediction scores.
help.notLoadingA: Try refreshing the page or clearing your browser cache. If the problem persists, check your internet connection. YancoCup works best on modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge).
help.bugQ: How do I report a bug?
help.bugA: Open an issue on our GitHub repository with a description of the problem, your browser, and any screenshots. We appreciate your help making YancoCup better!
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question, found a bug, or want to suggest a feature? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
contact.sentDesc: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
